name: Owner/Shareholder
description: Property owner and main shareholder — funds startup from personal finances

name: Permanent Staff
description: Full-time or part-time employees on monthly payroll

name: Casual/Temporary Worker
description: Day-hire workers for security, cleaning, maintenance, transport, events

name: Supplier
description: Vendors providing goods — feed, provisions, hardware, equipment

name: Consultant
description: Professional advisors — vet, accountant, event planner, wellness practitioner

name: Agent
description: Intermediaries — event booking agents, transport agents

name: Client
description: People/organisations hiring the venue for events or wellness services
